CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2019 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment By Court With Request For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-11-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Hien Kim Talicia Pham, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Glen M. Belovsky, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Tsui Chu Yee, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Hien Kim Talicia Pham, an individual.
Plaintiff's complaint for Conversion, Fraud and Breach of Contract was filed on August 6, 2019, and was personally on defendant Hien Kim Talicia Pham, an individual, on August 8, 2019.
Plaintiff's Notice of Preservation of Right to Seek Punitive Damages was personally served on defendant on December 19, 2018.
Default as to defendant Hien Kim Talicia Pham, an individual, an individual, was entered on January 3, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on January 11, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Tsui Chu Yee, and against the Defaulted Defendant Hien Kim Talicia Pham, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $375,890.40.
Costs - $530.00.
Punitive Damages - $1,000,000.00.

Total - $1,375,890.40.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
